text:
Meet the new AI Assistant in Photoshop 👋 

Now available in Photoshop on mobile and web.
New Adjustment Layers in Photoshop! Clarity and dehaze + Grain are now non-destructive and maskable, keeping every tweak flexible. Try the latest update—link in bio.
New features in Photoshop and Photoshop (beta) mean new ways to create. Update Photoshop today! Link in bio.

Creativity is deeply human, and it works best when you stay in the flow. ✨ 

For @magdiellop, features like Generative Fill in @Photoshop help keep the momentum going. 

Check the link in our bio to watch the full video. 💫

You don’t need to browse for png assets online anymore! @Photoshop has improved their select tools, which means removing backgrounds from images has never been easier (yes, even hair!!!), literally in one click :)

I use a lot of images to create my work, so I’m always looking for the most efficient ways to speed up my process for repetitive, time-consuming tasks, like perfectly cropping an image. That way I can focus on the creative part of the process, which is what I love the most

Try the Select Subject and Object Selection Tool today and let me know what you think! #AdobePhotoshopPartner

The most subtle differences can have the biggest impact🍊 

Skin tones can be such an overlooked element of an image when you’re so focused on editing style but WOW does it make a difference when you turn your attention to them. No matter how cool your edits are, if the skin tones are off, everything will look slightly off 😅 

So let me know if you give the @photoshop Adjust Colors tool a try! It’s such a versatile feature that can do so much more than just help you fix skin tones too, you can get so creative with it!! 💙💛🩷 

And let me know if you have any other tips or advice for accurate and good skin tones in photos?! 

#photoshopedits #adobephotoshoppartner #editingtipsandtricks #creativeportraits
Swipe to edit. Follow @tinycactus layer, adjust, and build a photo in Photoshop.
Would you have guessed this short started in a parking lot? 👀 @aaronbhall uses Harmonize to speed up his composite workflow. Try in Photoshop today!
Stopping your scroll for a little winter nostalgia ❄️ By @albertdrosphotography.

Hot take: we agree with all of @magdiellop's @photoshop opinions. 😎 

What do you think? Drop your thoughts in the comments!

The backdrop color I wanted was sold out, but not a problem. This is how I use Adjust Colors in @Photoshop to shift a blue backdrop to the exact teal I had in mind, without using masking or touching the subject at all. #AdobePhotoshopPartner
“Sometimes I make a mistake and that ends up being something I like.” ✨ Swipe for a few thoughts from artist @tinycactus.
